Manual-derivation worklist from an ARD

Source: R/ars_to_ard.R
ars_manual_worklist.Rd

Lists every reserved manual_pending cell in an ARD produced by ars_to_ard() – statistics arsbridge could not compute (a declared-but-unexecutable method, e.g. a Cochran-Mantel-Haenszel p-value) and reserved as keyed stub rows. This is the analyst's checklist: each row must be computed with a validated analysis script and written back into the ARD (set stat, result_status = "manual_filled", value_source, derivation_ref) before the table is final. See vignette("getting-started") and the ADRs under adr/ for the round-trip.

Usage

ars_manual_worklist(ard)

Arguments

ard

An ARD data frame of class "card" from ars_to_ard().

Value

A data frame with one row per pending cell: output_id, analysis_id, method_id, group1, group1_level, variable, stat_name. Zero rows (with those columns) when nothing is pending.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
  ard <- ars_to_ard("outputs/reporting_event.json", "inputs/ADaM")
  ars_manual_worklist(ard)
} # }
